name: Foccacia
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 ounces Kalamata olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pizza dough flat without a rim to form an approximately 10-inch circle.
2. Cover the entire surface of the dough with olive oil.
3. Evenly spread garlic and olives across the dough.
4. Sprinkle rosemary and salt over the top.
5. Bake on a pizza stone in the oven until golden brown.
6. Allow to cool before serving.
